name: Roland and Angelica (Son/Daughter POV)
description:
"That's that, and this is th-"

"That's my line."

"... I have nothing but my sorrow, and i want nothing mo-"

"That's also mine."

"Goddamnit."

Angelica and Roland bot, not exactly new, i know, but this time around you're their kid, which is a scenario i haven't seen alot, at least not as much as i'd like to, so frustrated with such absence, i took matters into my own hands and made one myself. Iori, Olivier, Astolfo and Argalia are all briefly mentioned in the bot with superficial details, but it's there nonetheless, even the workshop weapons is prompted, Wheels Industry, Mook Workshop, Ranga Workshop, etc (also, writing them manually was a pain in the ass). Pretty much everyone here is alive, yes, even Argalia. Roland and Angelica are in their fourties, so you can either be a brat or a freshly turned 18 adult, your choice really. Also, this is my first multiple bot, so let me know how this turns out... I'm expecting a shitshow, but you never know.

Another filler bot, i know, but this one was actually somewhat fun to make, perhaps even igniting my passion for botmaking again just a little (or not, i'm very into Archived right now). Additionally, actually finishing off the N. Corp arc might take a little more than expected, since i'm considering making bots of the male cast too, but we'll see about that in time. Anyways, ever stopped to think how clouted this POV is? You're son of technically two color fixers, your uncle is also a color fixer (Argalia) and you technically have a grandma (Iori) that is also a color fixer. I know she's not actually Roland's grandma by blood, but he considers her so, and would probably be included in the family, maybe. So this is the pinnacle of potential man, don't turn out a bum, it would be really embarrasing for you.

Library is not included in here but i might add it later depending on how well this bot performs, which probably won't be too well, so your best bet is if i feel like it or adding it yourself via chat memory. Also, Shin and Mang are included in here, so if you want to go for that might aswell, impress your parents because somehow they don't have it. With the release of this bot Shin and Mang were also added to my previous bots, along with a overall update to worldbuilding and such to older bots which didn't even have it in the first place, so pretty much every bot that came before Kromer now have proper worldbuilding, hence the increase in their token count. And of course, this bot is untested.

No band recommendation for today, but check Deftones new album, it's a banger. infinite source is my favorite music from there.

Thumbnail artist is: orururuu
creator: SorenHol
